# Golden Age Mappings

A continuation of the mappings for 1.7.10.

Built on top of [LegacyMappings](https://github.com/LegacyModdingMC/LegacyMappings). Special thanks to the LegacyModdingMC team for providing the foundation!

## Directory Structure
- `mappings/`: Contains the raw CSV mapping files (`fields.csv`, `methods.csv`, `params.csv`).

## Usage

These mappings can be used in different development environments for 1.7.10:

### 1. Using with Minecraft Forge (ForgeGradle 1.2)
To use these mappings in a legacy Forge workspace:
1. Compress the three files under `mappings/` (`fields.csv`, `methods.csv`, and `params.csv`) into a single `.zip` archive.
2. In your Forge project's `build.gradle`, point the `minecraft.mappings` setting to your zip archive:
   ```groovy
   minecraft {
       version = "1.7.10-10.13.4.1614-1.7.10"
       runDir = "eclipse"
       mappings = files("path/to/your/golden-age-mappings.zip")
   }
   ```
3. Run `./gradlew setupDecompWorkspace` to regenerate the workspace with the new mappings.

### 2. Using with RetroFuturaGradle (RFG)
To use these mappings in a modern RetroFuturaGradle workspace without modifying your global caches:
1. Copy the `fields.csv`, `methods.csv`, and `params.csv` files into your project directory (e.g. into `gradle/mappings/`).
2. Add the following task configurations at the bottom of your `build.gradle` (for Groovy) or `build.gradle.kts` (for Kotlin DSL):

   #### For Groovy (`build.gradle`):
   ```groovy
   tasks.named("generateForgeSrgMappings", com.gtnewhorizons.retrofuturagradle.mcp.GenSrgMappingsTask) {
       fieldsCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/fields.csv"))
       methodsCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/methods.csv"))
   }
   tasks.named("remapDecompiledJar", com.gtnewhorizons.retrofuturagradle.mcp.RemapSourceJarTask) {
       paramCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/params.csv"))
   }
   ```

   #### For Kotlin DSL (`build.gradle.kts`):
   ```kotlin
   tasks.named<com.gtnewhorizons.retrofuturagradle.mcp.GenSrgMappingsTask>("generateForgeSrgMappings") {
       fieldsCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/fields.csv"))
       methodsCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/methods.csv"))
   }
   tasks.named<com.gtnewhorizons.retrofuturagradle.mcp.RemapSourceJarTask>("remapDecompiledJar") {
       paramCsv.set(file("gradle/mappings/params.csv"))
   }
   ```
3. Run `./gradlew setupDecompWorkspace` to apply the custom mappings.

### 3. Using with Mod Coder Pack (MCP)
To use these mappings in a standalone Mod Coder Pack (MCP 908) workspace:
1. Copy the `fields.csv`, `methods.csv`, and `params.csv` files from the `mappings/` directory.
2. Paste them into the `conf/` directory of your MCP workspace, replacing the existing files.
3. If you haven't decompiled yet, run `decompile.bat` (Windows) or `./decompile.sh` (Linux/macOS) as normal.
4. If you have already decompiled, run `updatenames.bat` (Windows) or `./updatenames.sh` (Linux/macOS) to apply the new mapping names to your existing source code.


# Full Index

This is a complete list of all mapped fields and methods for the funny block game, organized by class.

In all probabilty, the class Render is generic (Render<T extends Entity) and this method has signature public void func_76986_a(T entity, double d, double d1, double d2, float f, float f1). But JAD is pre 1.5 so doesn't do that. |

| `func_94532_c` | `getDragEvent` | Gets the drag event of this contAIner. |

| `func_150722_a` | `provideLocalClient` | Prepares a clientside NetworkManager: establishes a connection to the socket supplied and configures the channel pipeline. Returns the newly created instance. |
| `func_150725_a` | `scheduleOutboundPacket` | Will flush the outbound queue and dispatch the supplied Packet if the channel is ready, otherwise it adds the packet to the outbound queue and registers the GenericFutureListener to fire after transmission |

## Class: `net.minecraft.network.PacketBuffer`

### Fields
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `field_150794_a` | `buf` | The buf of this packet buffer. |

### Methods
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `func_150790_a` | `getVarIntSize` | Calculates the number of bytes required to fit the supplied int (0-5) if it were to be read/written using readVarIntFromBuffer or writeVarIntToBuffer |
| `func_150791_c` | `readItemStackFromBuffer` | Reads an ItemStack from this buffer |
| `func_150793_b` | `readNBTTagCompoundFromBuffer` | Reads a compressed NBTTagCompound from this buffer |
| `func_150789_c` | `readStringFromBuffer` | Reads a string from this buffer. Expected parameter is maximum allowed string length. Will throw IOException if string length exceeds this value! |
| `func_150792_a` | `readVarIntFromBuffer` | Reads a compressed int from the buffer. To do so it maximally reads 5 byte-sized chunks whose most significant bit dictates whether another byte should be read. |
| `func_150788_a` | `writeItemStackToBuffer` | Writes the ItemStack's ID (short), then size (byte), then damage. (short) |
| `func_150786_a` | `writeNBTTagCompoundToBuffer` | Writes a compressed NBTTagCompound to this buffer |
| `func_150785_a` | `writeStringToBuffer` | Writes a (UTF-8 encoded) String to this buffer. Will throw IOException if String length exceeds 32767 bytes |
| `func_150787_b` | `writeVarIntToBuffer` | Writes a compressed int to the buffer. The smallest number of bytes to fit the passed int will be written. Of each such byte only 7 bits will be used to describe the actual value since its most significant bit dictates whether the next byte is part of that same int. Micro-optimization for int values that are expected to have values below 128. |

## Class: `net.minecraft.network.play.INetHandlerPlayClient`

### Methods
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `func_147279_a` | `handleAnimation` | Renders a specified animation: Waking up a player, a living entity swinging its currently held item, being hurt or receiving a critical hit by normal or magical means |
| `func_147261_a` | `handleBlockAction` | Triggers Block.onBlockEventReceived, which is implemented in BlockPistonBase for extension/retraction, BlockNote for setting the instrument (including audiovisual feedback) and in BlockContainer to set the number of players accessing a (Ender)Chest |
| `func_147294_a` | `handleBlockBreakAnim` | Updates all registered IWorldAccess instances with destroyBlockInWorldPartially |
| `func_147234_a` | `handleBlockChange` | Updates the block and metadata and generates a blockupdate (and notify the clients) |
| `func_147252_a` | `handleChangeGameState` | Method to handle change game state on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147251_a` | `handleChat` | Prints a chatmessage in the chat GUI |
| `func_147263_a` | `handleChunkData` | Updates the specified chunk with the supplied data, marks it for re-rendering and lighting recalculation |
| `func_147276_a` | `handleCloseWindow` | Resets the ItemStack held in hand and closes the window that is opened |
| `func_147246_a` | `handleCollectItem` | Method to handle collect item on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147239_a` | `handleConfirmTransaction` | Verifies that the server and client are synchronized with respect to the inventory/container opened by the player and confirms if it is the case. |
| `func_147240_a` | `handleCustomPayload` | Handles packets that have room for a channel specification. Vanilla implemented channels are "MC|TrList" to acquire a MerchantRecipeList trades for a villager merchant, "MC|Brand" which sets the server brand? on the player instance and finally "MC|RPack" which the server uses to communicate the identifier of the default server resourcepack for the client to load. |
| `func_147238_a` | `handleDestroyEntities` | Locally eliminates the entities. Invoked by the server when the items are in fact destroyed, or the player is no longer registered as required to monitor them. The latter  happens when distance between the player and item increases beyond a certain treshold (typically the viewing distance) |
| `func_147253_a` | `handleDisconnect` | Closes the network channel |
| `func_147254_a` | `handleDisplayScoreboard` | Removes or sets the ScoreObjective to be displayed at a particular scoreboard position (list, sidebar, below name) |
| `func_147277_a` | `handleEffect` | Method to handle effect on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147243_a` | `handleEntityAttach` | Method to handle entity attach on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147260_a` | `handleEntityEffect` | Method to handle entity effect on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147242_a` | `handleEntityEquipment` | Method to handle entity equipment on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147267_a` | `handleEntityHeadLook` | Updates the direction in which the specified entity is looking, normally this head rotation is independent of the rotation of the entity itself |
| `func_147284_a` | `handleEntityMetadata` | Invoked when the server registers new proximate objects in your watchlist or when objects in your watchlist have changed -> Registers any changes locally |
| `func_147259_a` | `handleEntityMovement` | Updates the specified entity's position by the specified relative moment and absolute rotation. Note that subclassing of the packet allows for the specification of a subset of this data (e.g. only rel. position, abs. rotation or both). |
| `func_147290_a` | `handleEntityProperties` | Updates en entity's attributes and their respective modifiers, which are used for speed bonusses (player sprinting, animals fleeing, baby speed), weapon/tool attackDamage, hostiles followRange randomization, zombie maxHealth and knockback resistance as well as reinforcement spawning chance. |
| `func_147236_a` | `handleEntityStatus` | Invokes the entities' handleUpdateHealth method which is implemented in LivingBase (hurt/death), MinecartMobSpawner (spawn delay), FireworkRocket & MinecartTNT (explosion), IronGolem (throwing,...), Witch (spawn particles), Zombie (villager transformation), Animal (breeding mode particles), Horse (breeding/smoke particles), Sheep (...), Tameable (...), Villager (particles for breeding mode, angry and happy), Wolf (...) |
| `func_147275_a` | `handleEntityTeleport` | Updates an entity's position and rotation as specified by the packet |
| `func_147244_a` | `handleEntityVelocity` | Sets the velocity of the specified entity to the specified value |
| `func_147283_a` | `handleExplosion` | Initiates a new explosion (sound, particles, drop spawn) for the affected blocks indicated by the packet. |
| `func_147257_a` | `handleHeldItemChange` | Updates which hotbar slot of the player is currently selected |
| `func_147282_a` | `handleJoinGame` | Registers some server properties (gametype,hardcore-mode,terraintype,difficulty,player limit), creates a new WorldClient and sets the player initial dimension |
| `func_147272_a` | `handleKeepAlive` | Method to handle keep alive on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147269_a` | `handleMapChunkBulk` | Method to handle map chunk bulk on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147264_a` | `handleMaps` | Updates the worlds MapStorage with the specified MapData for the specified map-identifier and invokes a MapItemRenderer for it |
| `func_147287_a` | `handleMultiBlockChange` | Received from the servers PlayerManager if between 1 and 64 blocks in a chunk are changed. If only one block requires an update, the server sends S23PacketBlockChange and if 64 or more blocks are changed, the server sends S21PacketChunkData |
| `func_147265_a` | `handleOpenWindow` | Displays a GUI by ID. In order starting from id 0: Chest, Workbench, Furnace, Dispenser, Enchanting table, Brewing stand, Villager merchant, Beacon, Anvil, Hopper, Dropper, Horse |
| `func_147289_a` | `handleParticles` | Spawns a specified number of particles at the specified location with a randomized displacement according to specified bounds |
| `func_147270_a` | `handlePlayerAbilities` | Method to handle player abilities on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147256_a` | `handlePlayerListItem` | Method to handle player list item on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147258_a` | `handlePlayerPosLook` | Handles changes in player positioning and rotation such as when travelling to a new dimension, (re)spawning, mounting horses etc. Seems to immediately reply to the server with the clients post-processing perspective on the player positioning |
| `func_147262_a` | `handleRemoveEntityEffect` | Method to handle remove entity effect on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147280_a` | `handleRespawn` | Method to handle respawn on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147291_a` | `handleScoreboardObjective` | May create a scoreboard objective, remove an objective from the scoreboard or update an objectives' displayname |
| `func_147295_a` | `handleSetExperience` | Method to handle set experience on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147266_a` | `handleSetSlot` | Handles pickin up an ItemStack or dropping one in your inventory or an open (non-creative) container |
| `func_147268_a` | `handleSignEditorOpen` | Creates a sign in the specified location if it didn't exist and opens the GUI to edit its text |
| `func_147255_a` | `handleSoundEffect` | Method to handle sound effect on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147286_a` | `handleSpawnExperienceOrb` | Spawns an experience orb and sets its value (amount of XP) |
| `func_147292_a` | `handleSpawnGlobalEntity` | Handles globally visible entities. Used in vanilla for lightning bolts |
| `func_147281_a` | `handleSpawnMob` | Spawns the mob entity at the specified location, with the specified rotation, momentum and type. Updates the entities Datawatchers with the entity metadata specified in the packet |
| `func_147235_a` | `handleSpawnObject` | Spawns an instance of the objecttype indicated by the packet and sets its position and momentum |
| `func_147288_a` | `handleSpawnPainting` | Handles the spawning of a painting object |
| `func_147237_a` | `handleSpawnPlayer` | Handles the creation of a nearby player entity, sets the position and held item |
| `func_147271_a` | `handleSpawnPosition` | Method to handle spawn positionition on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147293_a` | `handleStatistics` | Updates the players statistics or achievements |
| `func_147274_a` | `handleTabComplete` | Displays the available command-completion options the server knows of |
| `func_147247_a` | `handleTeams` | Updates a team managed by the scoreboard: Create/Remove the team registration, Register/Remove the player-team-memberships, Set team displayname/prefix/suffix and/or whether friendly fire is enabled |
| `func_147285_a` | `handleTimeUpdate` | Method to handle time update on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147249_a` | `handleUpdateHealth` | Method to handle update health on this i net handler play client. |
| `func_147250_a` | `handleUpdateScore` | Either updates the score with a specified value or removes the score for an objective |
| `func_147248_a` | `handleUpdateSign` | Updates a specified sign with the specified text lines |
| `func_147273_a` | `handleUpdateTileEntity` | Updates the NBTTagCompound metadata of instances of the following entitytypes: Mob spawners, command blocks, beacons, skulls, flowerpot |
| `func_147278_a` | `handleUseBed` | Retrieves the player identified by the packet, puts him to sleep if possible (and flags whether all players are asleep) |
| `func_147241_a` | `handleWindowItems` | Handles the placement of a specified ItemStack in a specified container/inventory slot |
| `func_147245_a` | `handleWindowProperty` | Sets the progressbar of the opened window to the specified value |

## Class: `net.minecraft.util.MathHelper`

### Fields
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `field_76144_a` | `SIN_TABLE` | A table of sin values computed from 0 (inclusive) to 2*pi (exclusive), with steps of 2*PI / 65536. |
| `field_151242_b` | `multiplyDeBruijnBitPosition` | Though it looks like an array, this is really more like a mapping.  Key (index of this array) is the upper 5 bits of the result of multiplying a 32-bit unsigned integer by the B(2, 5) De Bruijn sequence 0x077CB531.  Value (value stored in the array) is the unique index (from the right) of the leftmost one-bit in a 32-bit unsigned integer that can cause the upper 5 bits to get that value.  Used for highly optimized "find the log-base-2 of this number" calculations. |

### Methods
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `func_76135_e` | `abs` | Method to abs on this math helper. |
| `func_154353_e` | `absFloor` | Method to abs floor on this math helper. |

| `func_76127_a` | `average` | Method to average on this math helper. |

| `func_151239_c` | `calculateLogBaseTwo` | Efficiently calculates the floor of the base-2 log of an integer value.  This is effectively the index of the highest bit that is set.  For example, if the number in binary is 0...100101, this will return 5. |
| `func_151241_e` | `calculateLogBaseTwoDeBruijn` | Uses a B(2, 5) De Bruijn sequence and a lookup table to efficiently calculate the log-base-two of the given value.  Optimized for cases where the input value is a power-of-two.  If the input value is not a power-of-two, then subtract 1 from the return value. |
| `func_76143_f` | `ceiling_double_int` | Method to ceiling_double_integer on this math helper. |
| `func_76123_f` | `ceiling_float_int` | Method to ceiling_float_integer on this math helper. |

| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |

| `field_82912_p` | `heightMapMinimum` | Lowest value in the heightmap. |
| `field_111204_q` | `inhabitedTime` | the cumulative number of ticks players have been in this chunk |
| `field_76636_d` | `isChunkLoaded` | Whether or not this Chunk is currently loaded into the World |

| `field_150814_l` | `isLightPopulated` | True if this chunk is light populated. |
| `field_76640_a` | `isLit` | Determines if the chunk is lit or not at a light value greater than 0. |
| `field_76643_l` | `isModified` | Set to true if the chunk has been modified and needs to be updated internally. |
| `field_76646_k` | `isTerrainPopulated` | Boolean value indicating if the terrain is populated. |
| `field_76641_n` | `lastSaveTime` | The time according to World.worldTime when this chunk was last saved |
| `field_150817_t` | `logger` | The logger of this chunk. |
| `field_76638_b` | `precipitationHeightMap` | A map, similar to heightMap, that tracks how far down precipitation can fall. |
| `field_76649_t` | `queuedLightChecks` | Contains the current round-robin relight check index, and is implied as the relight check location as well. |
| `field_76642_o` | `sendUpdates` | Updates to this chunk will not be sent to clients if this is false. This field is set to true the first time the chunk is sent to a client, and never set to false. |
| `field_76652_q` | `storageArrays` | Used to store block IDs, block MSBs, Sky-light maps, Block-light maps, and metadata. Each entry corresponds to a logical segment of 16x16x16 blocks, stacked vertically. |
| `field_76639_c` | `updateSkylightColumns` | Which columns need their skylightMaps updated. |
| `field_76637_e` | `worldObj` | Reference to the World object. |
| `field_76635_g` | `xPosition` | The x coordinate of the chunk. |
| `field_76647_h` | `zPosition` | The z coordinate of the chunk. |

### Methods
| Searge Name | Mapped Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `func_76612_a` | `addEntity` | Adds an entity to the chunk. Args: entity |
| `func_150813_a` | `addTileEntity` | Method to add tile entity on this chunk. |
| `func_76619_d` | `canBlockSeeTheSky` | Returns whether is not a block above this one blocking sight to the sky (done via checking against the heightmap) |
| `func_150801_a` | `checkBorderLight` | Method to check border light on this chunk. |
| `func_150811_f` | `checkLight` | Method to check light on this chunk. |
| `func_150809_p` | `checkLight` | Method to check light on this chunk. |
| `func_76599_g` | `checkSkylightNeighborHeight` | Checks the height of a block next to a sky-visible block and schedules a lighting update as necessary. |
| `func_76594_o` | `enqueueRelightChecks` | Called once-per-chunk-per-tick, and advances the round-robin relight check index per-storage-block by up to 8 blocks at a time. In a worst-case scenario, can potentially take up to 1.6 seconds, calculated via (4096/(8*16))/20, to re-check all blocks in a chunk, which could explain both lagging light updates in certain cases as well as Nether relight |
| `func_76607_a` | `fillChunk` | Initialise this chunk with new binary data |
| `func_76590_a` | `generateHeightMap` | Generates the height map for a chunk from scratch |
| `func_76603_b` | `generateSkylightMap` | Generates the initial skylight map for the chunk upon generation or load. |
| `func_76606_c` | `getAreLevelsEmpty` | Returns whether the ExtendedBlockStorages containing levels (in blocks) from arg 1 to arg 2 are fully empty (true) or not (false). |
| `func_76605_m` | `getBiomeArray` | Returns an array containing a 16x16 mapping on the X/Z of block positions in this Chunk to biome IDs. |
| `func_76591_a` | `getBiomeGenForWorldCoords` | This method retrieves the biome at a set of coordinates |
| `func_150810_a` | `getBlock` | Gets the block of this chunk. |
| `func_150808_b` | `getBlockLightOpacity` | Gets the block light opacitY of this chunk. |
| `func_76629_c` | `getBlockLightValue` | Gets the amount of light on a block taking into account sunlight |
| `func_76628_c` | `getBlockMetadata` | Return the metadata corresponding to the given coordinates inside a chunk. |
| `func_76587_i` | `getBlockStorageArray` | Returns the ExtendedBlockStorage array for this Chunk. |
| `func_150806_e` | `getBlockTileEntityInChunk` | Gets the block tile entity in chunk of this chunk. |
| `func_76632_l` | `getChunkCoordIntPair` | Gets a ChunkCoordIntPair representing the Chunk's position. |

| `func_76588_a` | `getEntitiesWithinAABBForEntity` | Fills the given list of all entities that intersect within the given bounding box that aren't the passed entity Args: entity, aabb, listToFill |
| `func_76611_b` | `getHeightValue` | Returns the value in the height map at this x, z coordinate in the chunk |
| `func_76626_d` | `getPrecipitationHeight` | Gets the height to which rain/snow will fall. Calculates it if not already stored. |
| `func_76617_a` | `getRandomWithSeed` | Gets the random with seed of this chunk. |
| `func_76614_a` | `getSavedLightValue` | Gets the amount of light saved in this block (doesn't adjust for daylight) |
| `func_76625_h` | `getTopFilledSegment` | Returns the topmost ExtendedBlockStorage instance for this Chunk that actually contains a block. |
| `func_76600_a` | `isAtLocation` | Checks whether the chunk is at the X/Z location specified |
| `func_76621_g` | `isEmpty` | Checks if this chunk is empty. |
| `func_150802_k` | `isPopulated` | Checks if this chunk is populated. |
| `func_76601_a` | `needsSaving` | Returns true if this Chunk needs to be saved |
| `func_76631_c` | `onChunkLoad` | Called when this Chunk is loaded by the ChunkProvider |
| `func_76623_d` | `onChunkUnload` | Called when this Chunk is unloaded by the ChunkProvider |

| `func_76624_a` | `populateChunk` | Method to populate chunk on this chunk. |
| `func_76595_e` | `propagateSkylightOcclusion` | Propagates a given sky-visible block's light value downward and upward to neighboring blocks as necessary. |
| `func_150803_c` | `recheckGaps` | Method to recheck gaps on this chunk. |
| `func_76615_h` | `relightBlock` | Initiates the recalculation of both the block-light and sky-light for a given block inside a chunk. |
| `func_76622_b` | `removeEntity` | removes entity using its y chunk coordinate as its index |
| `func_76608_a` | `removeEntityAtIndex` | Removes entity at the specified index from the entity array. |
| `func_150805_f` | `removeTileEntity` | Method to remove tile entity on this chunk. |

| `func_76616_a` | `setBiomeArray` | Accepts a 256-entry array that contains a 16x16 mapping on the X/Z plane of block positions in this Chunk to biome IDs. |
| `func_150807_a` | `setBlockIDWithMetadata` | Sets the block ID with metadata of this chunk. |

| `func_73156_b` | `unloadQueuedChunks` | Unloads chunks that are marked to be unloaded. This is not guaranteed to unload every such chunk. |
